ground_truth.title: Pro Bono Legal Services for Clients – State Bar of Nevada
ground_truth.main_content:
The State Bar of Nevada supports the promotion of access to justice in Nevada through the delivery of legal services to those in need. If you are in need of legal assistance, but cannot afford a lawyer, a Nevada legal aid provider or pro bono legal services may be available to you. Consult this Legal Resources Directory Brochure for more information or contact one of the legal service providers listed below.

NORTHERN NEVADA:

Volunteer Attorneys for Rural Nevadans (VARN) - Address: 412 West John Street, Suite C, Carson City, Nevada 89703 - Phone: 775.883.8278 - Website: varn.org

Northern Nevada Legal Aid - Address: 299 S. Arlington Ave. Reno, Nevada 89501 - Phone: 775.329.2727 - Website: www.nnlegalaid.org

Washoe County Law Library – "Lawyer in the Library Program" - Make an appointment to speak to a volunteer lawyer - Address: 75 Court St., Room 101, Reno, Nevada 89501 - Phone: 775.328.3250

SOUTHERN NEVADA:

Legal Aid Center of Southern Nevada - Address: 725 E. Charleston Blvd., Las Vegas, Nevada 89104 - Phone: 702.386.1070 - Website: lacsn.org

Southern Nevada Senior Law Program - Address: 7650 W. Sahara Ave., Las Vegas, Nevada 89117 - Phone: 702.229.6596

STATEWIDE:

Nevada Legal Services (Statewide offices) - Website: nevadalegalservices.org
Las Vegas Office: Address: 701 E. Bridger Ave., Ste. 400, Las Vegas, NV 89101 - Phone: 702.386.0404
Reno Office: Address: 449 S. Virginia Street, Reno, NV 89501 - Phone: 775.284.3491 ext. 218

Veterans and military service members/military spouses only: Nevada Attorney General Office of Military Legal Assistance - Phone: 775.687.2140 - Email: omila@nvag.gov - Website: nvagomla.nv.gov

For those not income-eligible for legal aid, you may use the State Bar of Nevada's Lawyer Referral Service.
with: The State Bar of Nevada supports the promotion of access to justice in Nevada through the delivery of legal services to those in need.
If you are in need of legal assistance, but cannot afford a lawyer, a Nevada legal aid provider or pro bono legal services may be available to you.
Northern Nevada Legal Aid - Address: 299 S. Arlington Ave. Reno, Nevada 89501 - Phone: 775.329.2727 - Website: www.nnlegalaid.org
Legal Aid Center of Southern Nevada - Address: 725 E. Charleston Blvd., Las Vegas, Nevada 89104 - Phone: 702.386.1070
Nevada Legal Services (Statewide offices) provides legal assistance through offices in Las Vegas and Reno.
